payload.title: Generate and persist a local CA
payload.description:
On first `scope serve` (when no CA exists), generate a self-signed root CA. Persist key + cert to ~/.scope-hub/ca/ with mode 0600 on the key. Print the SHA-256 fingerprint to stdout so the user can verify out-of-band when pairing devices.

Acceptance:
- ~/.scope-hub/ca/ca.key (0600) and ca.crt exist after first serve
- `scope ca fingerprint` prints the SHA-256
- Idempotent: re-running serve reuses the existing CA
- CA validity: 10 years (it's a personal-machine root)
- Use node's built-in crypto / x509, or node-forge if simpler — no openssl shell-out
